note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right lower leg wound site, rates 3/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Venous venous Right lower leg measures 6.4 cm x 4.5 cm x 0.6 cm.
  Wound bed: 62% slough, 38% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Venous venous Right lower leg — improving.
Plan: Negative pressure wound therapy initiated. Debridement consult ordered.

Pt seen for wound eval. Venous Right lower leg measures aprx 6.4 x 4.5cm, depth 0.6cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L ankle 3.8x2.7, 0.3cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Mon.
